creator: rsecor@seqlogic.com
text:
Did a portupgrade in mail/vpopmail.
It overwrote my vpopmail.mysql file :(.

Additionally, it looks like it didn't upgrade the database table!
# ./vuserinfo postmaster@localhost
vmysql: error creating table 'limits': Table 'limits' already exists
vmysql: sql error[p]: Unknown column 'disable_spamassassin' in 'field  
list'

Thanks,
Rich
